dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7256 IH: Federal Workforce Early Separation Incentives Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Langworthy introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To amend section 3523 of title 5, United States Code, to increase the limit on voluntary separation incentive payments, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Federal Workforce Early Separation Incentives Act.

section.header: Voluntary separation incentive payment limit increase
section.text: Section 3523(b)(3) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by striking be equal to and all that follows and inserting be an amount determined by the agency head, not to exceed 6 month’s pay at the rate received immediately before separation, as determined in the same manner as the limit on total severance pay under section 5595(c);.
